info.name: School ERP - Full API Collection
info.description: School ERP API collection. Set collection variable `base_url` (or import an environment). Run **01 Auth > POST /auth/login** first to set `auth_token`. For **08 Student app**, use a user with role STUDENT in the login body.

exec: if (j && j.data && j.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('auth_token', j.data.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.data.accessToken); }
if (j && j.data && j.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('auth_token', j.data.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', j.data.accessToken); }
